name: Database schema and Prisma setup
description: Initialize Prisma with SQLite. Create User model (id, email unique, password_hash, created_at, updated_at) and Task model (id, title, description nullable, status enum pending/in_progress/completed, user_id FK, created_at, updated_at). Generate and apply migration.

name: Auth endpoints — register and login
description: Create POST /api/auth/register (hash password with bcrypt, create user, return 201 with user object, 409 on duplicate email). Create POST /api/auth/login (verify password, return JWT with user_id in payload, 401 on invalid credentials). Add auth middleware that verifies JWT and attaches user to request.

name: Create task endpoint
description: Create POST /api/tasks. Requires auth. Accepts { title: string, description?: string }. Creates task with status 'pending' owned by authenticated user. Returns 201 with task object.

name: List tasks endpoint
description: Create GET /api/tasks. Requires auth. Returns only the authenticated user's tasks. Supports pagination via ?page=N&limit=N query params (default page=1, limit=20). Returns { data: Task[], pagination: { page, limit, total } }.

name: Update and delete task endpoints
description: Create PATCH /api/tasks/:id for status updates. Accepts { status: 'in_progress' | 'completed' }. Returns 200 with updated task, 400 for invalid status, 403 if not owner, 404 if not found. Create DELETE /api/tasks/:id. Returns 204 on success, 403 if not owner, 404 if not found.

name: Health endpoint
description: Create GET /api/health that returns { status: 'ok' } with 200. Verify the dev server starts cleanly with no errors.
